text:
The Lamentation Tours (, Gōkyū Kankō Basu—lit. "Lamentation Tour Bus") is a daily bus tour ride that runs around Dentora's mountains. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 39 

Overview

Lamentation Tours gives tourists a ride up to Kukuroo Mountain. During the bus ride, a tour guide divulges all available information about the Zoldyck Family to tourists. 

Crew Members

Unnamed bus driver 
Coco Loo 

Tourists

Gon Freecss 
Leorio Paradinight 
Kurapika 
Two unnamed bounty hunters 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

Taking the advice of a fruit stall lady, Gon, Leorio, and Kurapika take the Lamentation Tours up to Kukuroo Mountain. During the ride up the mountain, the tour guide discloses information relating to the Zoldyck Family. 

Upon arriving at the main gate, the tour guide announces this is as far as they can go as the rest of the mountain belongs to the Zoldyck Family. Gon, on the other hand, still inquires how they can gain access to the mountain. This inquiry irritates, the tour guide irritated, who tries to dissuade him from trying to enter. Two bounty hunters then break into the door into the Zoldyck compound while ruffing up an old man. 

Moments after entering the compound, a giant claw opens the doors and drops off the two skeletal bodies of the would-be bounty hunters. The old man chastises the claw, and witnessing this scenario, the bus tour guide and tourists try and leave the area. Gon and the group, however, decide that they wish to stay, leaving everyone astounded. 

Trivia

The name of the event is transliterated in the singular form as "Lamentation Tour" in Crunchyroll's version/translation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 22 (2011)
